action.reasoning: Observation: test_pathfinder.py error: ShortestPath has no attribute 'found'. That attribute may be missing in habitat-sim 0.3.3 bindings. Analysis: We can still retrieve path points (path.points) regardless of that attribute; checking len(path.points) > 0 serves as found indicator. The week-point controller itself was not yet run. Decision: Rewrite train.py and predict.py with corrected path checking (no .found()), tunable replanning every 5 steps, and test on 3 episodes in train.py to verify improvement before submitting eval.
